CustomField.description: MIS-474 If a new value is added to 'What is the customer's use case(s)?' (Use_Cases__c) field on Opportunity, formula should be updated
CustomField.formula: IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "User Acquisition: Marketing mix optimization" ), "MI: Marketing mix optimization; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "User Acquisition: Affiliates" ), "MI: Affiliates Marketing; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "User Acquisition: Organic (SEO, Content)" ), "MI: Organic (SEO, Content); ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "User Acquisition: Paid (PPC, Display)" ), "MI: Paid Marketing (PPC, Display); ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "User Acquisition: Other (Brand, PR, Social Listening)" ), "MI: Other (Brand, PR, Social Listening); ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Path to Purchase: Product demand (what to sell)" ), "PI: Product demand (what to sell); ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Path to Purchase: Product distribution (where to sell)" ), "PI: Product distribution (where to sell); ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Path to Purchase: Optimize conversion" ), "PI: Optimize conversion; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Sales: Lead enrichment" ), "SI: Lead enrichment; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Sales: Sales intelligence (find, qualify, close, retain, monitor customers or compaines)" ), "SI: Sales intelligence (find, qualify, close, retain, monitor customers or compaines); ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Investors: Source investment opportunities" ), "II: Source investment opportunities; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Investors: Diligence, M&A and investment research" ), "II: Diligence, M&A and investment research; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Investors: Public market investors" ), "II: Public market investors; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Other: Data integration" ), "OO: Data integration; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Other: Other" ), "OO: Other; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Research: Benchmark traffic, engagement and market share" ), "Research: Benchmark traffic, engagement and market share; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Research: Benchmark marketing channels performance against competitors" ), "Research: Benchmark marketing channels performance against competitors; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Agencies: Pitch new businesses" ), "Agencies: Pitch new businesses; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Agencies: Optimize clients' marketing strategies" ), "Agencies: Optimize clients' marketing strategies; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Market & Consumer Research: Understand market share, market sizing & trend analysis" ), "AI: Understand market share & trend analysis; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Opportunity__r.Use_Cases__c , "Market & Consumer Research: Understand audience" ), "AI: Understand audiences; ",null )
CustomField.label: Use-Case
